summary: Made one surgical exit edit to carry Bellglass's immediate aftermath into Chapter 17's dawn continuation. The opening was left intact because it already differs structurally from the adjacent visible chapter opening, and no style-bible example lines appeared verbatim in the chapter.
edits: Added a final paragraph noting Damaris's boys pasting the last blessing bills in wet curls along the south approach.
Anchored Silas's return to Ferrymouth with the bridge still arguing in his skull to smooth the handoff into Chapter 17.
